scope: Formal M4 multi-seed comparison and M5-B model-dependent ablations required before the M5-v03 and Gate C decisions
normalized_research_claim: Under the frozen Human2Robot v03 split and semantic contract, the RECAP residual bridge improves held-out robot trajectory prediction over No Retrieval and Retrieval Only, and the gain is supported by representation, retrieval, temporal, sensitivity, and resolution ablations.
claim_boundary: This protocol freezes future experiments; it is not evidence that any proposed experiment has passed.

frozen_data_contract.independence_unit: source episode, not a window or chunk from the same episode
frozen_data_contract.heldout_robot_usage: offline target evaluation only; forbidden in retrieval features, normalization, alignment, lag calibration, checkpoint selection, or training

optimization.data_parallel_world_size_rule: record and keep identical across every method and seed
optimization.training_budget_equality: same optimizer steps, per-rank batch, data-parallel world size, augmentation count, model parameter budget, and train samples for learned methods

checkpoint.selection_rule: fixed final checkpoint; no early stopping and no heldout-based checkpoint selection
checkpoint.failed_or_incomplete_run_rule: a run without step-7000 checkpoint is invalid and must be rerun, not imputed

required_methods.definition: same formal model and absolute query target, with retrieval conditioning masked during train and evaluation
aligned retrieved human plan projected into the canonical query representation without a learned bridge
same formal model conditioned on the retrieved human plan and trained to predict the absolute query target
same formal model conditioned on the retrieved human plan and trained to predict the residual from aligned pool plan to query target

primary.aggregation: first compute one median per heldout task per seed; inference windows are not independent replicates

long_term_residual_saturation_count.definition: at least 5 consecutive predicted residual steps above the train-only residual-norm 99th percentile

bootstrap.method: hierarchical paired bootstrap over heldout tasks then seeds within task

hypothesis_test.method: paired randomization test over task_x_seed differences
hypothesis_test.multiple_comparison_correction: Holm for the two primary baseline comparisons

statistical_protocol.missing_run_policy: no imputation; rerun the failed seed-method cell
statistical_protocol.reporting: report all task-level and seed-level values, paired differences, 95% CI, raw p, Holm-adjusted p, median, and IQR

experiment_matrix.visual_encoder_rule: same frozen encoder checkpoint for every variant

experiment_matrix.selection_rule: for every heldout task, show the 3 best and 3 worst task-seed cases by preregistered primary metric

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Human2Robot formal dataset/model adapter exists, loads the locked parent artifacts, emits every checkpoint binding, and passes unit plus one-batch overfit tests
every heldout task has at least 10 independent human demonstrations and all leakage audits pass
all required method-experiment-seed cells have valid step-7000 checkpoints and manifests; no missing cell is imputed

for primary error, RECAP minus No Retrieval and RECAP minus Retrieval Only both have hierarchical-bootstrap 95% CI upper bound below 0, Holm-adjusted p below 0.05, and RECAP improves at least 3 of 4 heldout tasks
pool-10 minus pool-0 primary error and fitted primary-error slope versus pool size both have 95% CI upper bound below 0; at most one adjacent pool-size step may worsen

residual representation beats both absolute and future-state on the primary metric with 95% CI upper bound below 0; phase retrieval beats random retrieval; all negative action controls are detected and excluded from main results
the frozen main top-k and H/K setting is not worse than the best tested alternative by more than a preregistered 5% relative non-inferiority margin

all injected temporal discontinuities remain segment-safe; mild frame-drop/jitter settings degrade the primary metric by no more than 10% relative to clean; severe invalid inputs are detected and rejected or masked before inference
the 240x424 main preprocessing has visual top-k Jaccard overlap at least 0.90 and primary-metric degradation no more than the 5% relative non-inferiority margin versus source-426 processing
all registered guardrail counts equal their pass values for every method, seed, heldout task, and pool size
all machine-readable results, task-seed tables, confidence intervals, corrected tests, learning curves, qualitative cases, failure cases, code/config/checkpoint hashes, and limitations are present

full_m5_decision_rule: M5-v03 is passed only if every M5B-P* and M5B-G* gate passes. Any failed or missing gate keeps M5 and Gate C pending.
claim_downgrade_rules: If M5B-G1 fails, do not claim RECAP outperforms either required baseline.
If M5B-G2 fails, do not claim pool growth improves performance.
If M5B-G3 fails, do not attribute gains to the residual or retrieval mechanism.
If M5B-G4 fails, do not claim hyperparameter stability.
If M5B-G5 fails, do not claim temporal robustness.
If M5B-G6 fails, do not claim visual resolution invariance.
M5 passage never implies executable command semantics, physical safety, or M6 rollout approval.
fairness_and_validity_risks: Only four heldout tasks are available; report task-level results and do not generalize beyond the frozen split.
Three seeds estimate optimization variance but do not replace independent task or demonstration replication.
Windows from one episode are correlated and cannot increase the statistical sample size.
The 2B Human2Robot adapter is not implemented yet; protocol passage is not execution readiness.
XYZ physical units and executable command semantics remain unresolved and are outside M5.

blocking_prerequisites: NEEDS_IMPLEMENTATION: formal 2B Human2Robot dataset/model adapter and configs
NEEDS_DATA: 10 independent heldout human demonstrations per task
RUN_BOUND_REQUIRED: resolved pretrained checkpoint SHA256 and fixed data-parallel world size

recommended_next_stage: Implement and validate M5B-P0 formal Human2Robot adapter, while expanding the independent heldout human-only pool required by M5B-P1.
